sentences.target: Il y a une centaine de personnes dehors.
sentences.reading: /il j‿a yn sɑ̃.tɛn də pɛʁ.sɔn də.ɔʁ/

translations.fr: Il y a une centaine de personnes dehors.
translations.ipa: /il j‿a yn sɑ̃.tɛn də pɛʁ.sɔn də.ɔʁ/
translations.en: There are about a hundred people outside.
translations.it: Ci sono circa cento persone fuori.
translations.pt: Há cerca de cem pessoas lá fora.
translations.vi: Bên ngoài có khoảng một trăm người.
translations.ar: هناك نحو مئة شخص في الخارج.
translations.nl: Er sąn buiten ongeveer honderd mensen.
translations.pl: Na zewnątrz jest około stu osób.
translations.nb: Det er omtrent hundre personer ute.
translations.id: Di luar ada sekitar seratus orang.
translations.sv: Det är ungefär hundra personer utomhus.
translations.ro: Afară sunt aproximativ o sută de persoane.
translations.da: Der er omkring hundrede mennesker udenfor.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person singular); in the fixed existential construction 'il y a', it functions as an expletive subject.
Adverbial clitic pronoun referring to place; part of the expression 'il y a' indicating existence ('there is/are').
Main verb 'avoir' in present indicative, 3rd person singular; in 'il y a' expresses existence.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'centaine'.
Common noun meaning an approximate group of one hundred; head of the quantified noun phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement of the noun 'centaine' (quantity: 'of people').
Common noun, feminine plural; complement to 'centaine' specifying what the hundred consists of.
Adverb indicating location; modifies the clause to specify where the people are.

sentences.target: On a une centaine de commandes aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On a une centaine de commandes aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We have about a hundred orders today.
translations.de: Wir haben heute etwa hundert Bestellungen.
translations.ko: 오늘 약 백 건의 주문이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天有大约一百个订单。
translations.yue: 我哋今日有大約一百張訂單。
translations.ru: У нас сегодня около ста заказов.
translations.pt: Hoje temos cerca de cem pedidos.
translations.he: היום יש לנו בערך מאה הזמנות.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi có khoảng một trăm đơn hàng.
translations.nl: Vandaag hebben we ongeveer honderd bestellingen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні у нас близько сотні замовлень.
translations.hi: आज हमारे पास लगभग सौ ऑर्डर हैं.
translations.nb: I dag har vi omtrent hundre bestillinger.
translations.id: Hari ini kami punya sekitar seratus pesanan.
translations.sv: I dag har vi ungefär hundra beställningar.
translations.ro: Astăzi avem aproximativ o sută de comenzi.
translations.da: I dag har vi omkring hundrede ordrer.
translations.fi: Tänään meillä on noin sata tilausta.
translations.ja: 今日は注文が約百件あります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun with impersonal value, often used colloquially for 'we'; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb 'avoir' in present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on'); expresses possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'centaine'.
Common noun denoting approximate quantity; direct object of 'a'.
Preposition introducing the complement of quantity for 'centaine'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement to 'centaine'.
Temporal adverb specifying when; modifies the clause.

sentences.target: Tu prépares une centaine de flyers aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁe.paʁ yn sɑ̃.tɛn də flajœʁ o.ʒuʁ.dɥi/

translations.fr: Tu prépares une centaine de flyers aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁe.paʁ yn sɑ̃.tɛn də flajœʁ o.ʒuʁ.dɥi/
translations.en: You’re preparing about a hundred flyers today.
translations.es: Hoy vas a preparar unos cien folletos.
translations.de: Heute bereitest du etwa hundert Flyer vor.
translations.ko: 오늘 전단지 약 백 장을 준비해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天要准备大约一百张传单。
translations.yue: 你今日要準備大約一百張傳單。
translations.ru: Сегодня ты готовишь около сотни листовок.
translations.pt: Hoje você vai preparar cerca de cem panfletos.
translations.he: היום אתה מכין בערך מאה עלונים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bạn chuẩn bị khoảng một trăm tờ rơi.
translations.ar: اليوم أنت تُحضّر نحو مئة منشور.
translations.nl: Vandaag bereid je ongeveer honderd flyers voor.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ти готуєш близько сотні флаєрів.
translations.hi: आज तुम लगभग सौ पर्चे तैयार कर रहे हो.
translations.nb: I dag forbereder du omtrent hundre flyere.
translations.id: Hari ini kamu menyiapkan sekitar seratus selebaran.
translations.sv: I dag förbereder du ungefär hundra flygblad.
translations.ro: Astăzi pregătești aproximativ o sută de pliante.
translations.da: I dag forbereder du omkring hundrede flyers.
translations.ja: 今日はチラシを約100枚用意します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'centaine'.
Common noun denoting approximate quantity; head of the object noun phrase.
Preposition linking 'centaine' to its complement.
Loanword noun (plural; final -s not pronounced); complement to 'centaine'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.

sentences.target: J'ai une centaine de photos à trier.
sentences.reading: /ʒe yn sɑ̃.tɛn də fɔ.to a tʁije/

translations.fr: J'ai une centaine de photos à trier.
translations.ipa: /ʒe yn sɑ̃.tɛn də fɔ.to a tʁije/
translations.en: I have about a hundred photos to sort.
translations.es: Tengo unas cien fotos para ordenar.
translations.de: Ich habe etwa hundert Fotos zum Sortieren.
translations.it: Ho circa cento foto da riordinare.
translations.ko: 정리해야 할 사진이 약 백 장 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有大约一百张照片要整理。
translations.yue: 我有大約一百張相要整理。
translations.ru: Мне нужно отсортировать около ста фотографий.
translations.pt: Tenho cerca de cem fotos para organizar.
translations.he: יש לי בערך מאה תמונות למיין.
translations.tr: Sınıflandırmam gereken yaklaşık yüz fotoğrafım var.
translations.vi: Tôi có khoảng một trăm bức ảnh cần sắp xếp.
translations.nl: Ik heb ongeveer honderd foto's om te sorteren.
translations.uk: У мене близько сотні фотографій для сортування.
translations.hi: मेरे पास छाँटने के लिए लगभग सौ तस्वीरें हैं.
translations.pl: Mam około stu zdjęć do posegregowania.
translations.el: Έχω περίπου εκατό φωτογραφίες για ταξινόμηση.
translations.nb: Jeg har omtrent hundre bilder å sortere.
translations.id: Saya punya sekitar seratus foto untuk disortir.
translations.sv: Jag har ungefär hundra foton att sortera.
translations.ro: Am aproximativ o sută de fotografii de sortat.
translations.cs: Mám asi sto fotek k roztřídění.
translations.da: Jeg har omkring hundrede fotos at sortere.
translations.fi: Minulla on noin sata valokuvaa lajiteltavana.
translations.ja: 仕分けする写真が約100枚あります。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) with elision before a vowel-initial verb form.
Main verb 'avoir' in present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses possession.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'centaine'.
Common noun indicating approximate quantity; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing the complement of 'centaine'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement to 'centaine'.
Preposition introducing an infinitive; marks purpose or intended action.
Infinitive verb; complements 'à' to express purpose ('to sort').
